title: SeqLocal order record
description: Structured transcription of a VirtuizeBio order PDF (FAIS / WAIS). The PDF stays the human artifact; this record is the machine input — the pipeline never parses PDFs. Field mapping is documented in docs/amplicon-orders.md.

assay.description: FAIS = focused (single primer + 800 bp); WAIS = whole amplicon insert (F&R primers, or insert-inference when none given)

single_primer.description: FAIS: the one sequencing primer (PDF 'Primers' column)

primer_f.description: WAIS: forward primer (PDF 'F Primer'); omit for insert-inference mode

primer_r.description: WAIS: reverse primer (PDF 'R Primer'); omit for insert-inference mode

size_kb.description: expected size hint (Plasmid/Amplicon/Insert Size from the PDF), in kb

customer_primers.description: primers supplied by the customer for this order; override/extend assets/primers.csv
